name: Peach Champagne Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in a saucepan and melt it over medium heat.
2. Add the sugars and lemon juice to the melted butter, stirring until well combined.
3. Continue heating until the mixture reaches boiling point.
4. Boil the mixture until it turns light brown in color.
5. Stir in the peaches and champagne, ensuring they are evenly coated with the sauce.
6. Remove from heat and process the mixture in a blender or food processor until smooth.
7. Allow the sauce to cool completely before straining if desired.
